hero.title: Energy Intelligence for Infrastructure Operations
hero.subtitle: EnergieMIND is the technology platform and future dashboard for energy operations, miner monitoring, heat recovery metrics, and AI-driven optimization.

intro.title: Built for Energy Infrastructure Leaders
intro.description: EnergieMIND unifies real-time monitoring, analytics, and intelligent automation for mining facilities, renewable energy sites, and industrial thermal operations. Operated by TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems within the TVK Group ecosystem.

dashboard.title: Energy Dashboard
dashboard.description: Centralized operations center with real-time KPIs, alerts, and multi-site visibility.

miner.title: Miner Monitoring
miner.description: ASIC fleet intelligence with hash rate, temperature, power draw, and uptime tracking.

analytics.title: Energy Analytics
analytics.description: Consumption patterns, cost optimization, and predictive demand forecasting.

ai.title: AI Optimization

api.title: API & Developers

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Energy Operations?
cta.description: Request access to the EnergieMIND platform and join infrastructure operators using intelligent energy management.

faq.a1: EnergieMIND is a technology platform for energy dashboards, miner monitoring, heat recovery metrics, and AI optimization. It is operated by TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems as part of the TVK Group ecosystem.
faq.a2: The platform is designed for facility operators, infrastructure partners, energy managers, and authorized TVK ecosystem participants. Request access through our application form.
faq.a3: Yes. The platform website and future dashboard support 25 languages with fully localized content, not machine translation.
faq.q4: How does EnergieMIND relate to TVK Group?
faq.a4: EnergieMIND is an energy intelligence brand operated by TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems LTD, alongside EnteleKRON and other TVK ecosystem products.

hero.title: Energy Dashboard
hero.subtitle: Real-time operations center for monitoring power consumption, generation efficiency, and infrastructure KPIs across all your facilities.

realtime.title: Real-Time Monitoring
realtime.description: Live power consumption, generation output, and efficiency metrics updated every second.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.description: Configurable thresholds with instant notifications for anomalies and critical events.

multisite.title: Multi-Site View
multisite.description: Unified dashboard across mining facilities, solar installations, and industrial sites.

reports.title: Custom Reports
reports.description: Scheduled and on-demand reports with export to PDF, CSV, and API endpoints.

faq.q1: What metrics does the dashboard display?
faq.a1: The dashboard shows real-time power consumption, generation output, efficiency ratios, cost per kWh, carbon intensity, uptime, and custom KPIs configured per facility.
faq.a2: Yes. The multi-site view provides aggregated and per-site metrics with drill-down capabilities for detailed analysis.

hero.title: Miner Monitoring
hero.subtitle: Complete ASIC fleet intelligence with hash rate tracking, thermal monitoring, power analysis, and firmware status across all deployments.

hashrate.title: Hash Rate Tracking
hashrate.description: Per-device and fleet-wide hash rate with historical trends and performance benchmarks.

thermal.title: Thermal Monitoring
thermal.description: Chip and ambient temperature tracking with predictive overheating alerts.

power.title: Power Analysis
power.description: Per-unit power draw, efficiency ratios (J/TH), and cost allocation by pool or facility.

firmware.title: Firmware Status
firmware.description: EnergieMIND firmware version tracking, update management, and configuration sync.

faq.a1: The platform supports Antminer and compatible ASIC devices running EnergieMIND firmware, with expansion to additional hardware platforms planned.
faq.a2: Miner metrics are collected every 30 seconds with real-time streaming available via WebSocket API.

hero.title: Energy Analytics
hero.subtitle: Advanced analytics for consumption patterns, cost optimization, carbon footprint tracking, and predictive demand forecasting.

consumption.title: Consumption Analysis
consumption.description: Hourly, daily, and seasonal consumption patterns with anomaly detection.

cost.title: Cost Optimization
cost.description: Time-of-use analysis, tariff optimization, and demand charge reduction strategies.

carbon.title: Carbon Tracking
carbon.description: Real-time carbon intensity monitoring and emissions reporting for ESG compliance.

forecast.title: Demand Forecasting
forecast.description: ML-powered demand prediction for proactive capacity planning and load management.

faq.a1: The analytics engine integrates with smart meters, SCADA systems, miner telemetry, weather APIs, and custom data feeds via REST API.
faq.a2: Yes. Data can be exported via CSV, JSON, or accessed programmatically through the EnergieMIND API.

hero.title: Heat Recovery Metrics
hero.subtitle: Track thermal efficiency, waste heat utilization, and district heating integration from mining and industrial operations.

efficiency.title: Thermal Efficiency
efficiency.description: COP ratios, heat capture rates, and system efficiency benchmarks over time.

waste.title: Waste Heat Utilization
waste.description: Percentage of recovered waste heat used for heating, drying, or district energy.

district.title: District Heating
district.description: Integration metrics for district heating networks and thermal energy storage.

savings.title: Energy Savings
savings.description: Quantified fuel savings and carbon reduction from heat recovery operations.

faq.a1: Thermal sensors, flow meters, and temperature differential calculations provide real-time heat recovery metrics integrated into the platform dashboard.
faq.a2: Mining operations, data centers, industrial manufacturing, and renewable energy facilities with thermal byproducts benefit from heat recovery monitoring.

hero.title: AI Optimization
hero.subtitle: Intelligent energy management with AI-driven load balancing, predictive maintenance, and autonomous efficiency tuning.

load.title: Load Balancing
load.description: Dynamic power allocation across miners and facilities based on electricity prices and demand.

predictive.title: Predictive Maintenance
predictive.description: ML models predict hardware failures before they occur, reducing downtime and repair costs.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Tuning
autonomous.description: Self-adjusting frequency, voltage, and cooling parameters for optimal efficiency.

insights.title: Intelligence Insights
insights.description: Actionable recommendations powered by historical data and real-time conditions.

faq.a1: The platform uses ensemble ML models for demand forecasting, anomaly detection, and optimization, trained on operational data from TVK infrastructure deployments.
faq.a2: AI recommendations can operate in advisory mode or autonomous mode based on operator preferences and safety constraints.

hero.title: API & Developers
hero.subtitle: Integrate with the EnergieMIND platform using REST API, webhooks, and SDKs. Build custom dashboards and automation workflows.

rest.title: REST API
rest.description: Full-featured REST API with OAuth 2.0 authentication and rate limiting.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Real-time event notifications for alerts, status changes, and metric thresholds.

sdk.title: SDKs
sdk.description: Official SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Go with comprehensive documentation.

sandbox.title: Sandbox Environment
sandbox.description: Test integrations with simulated data before connecting to production infrastructure.

endpoints.title: API Overview
endpoints.metrics: GET /v1/metrics — Retrieve energy and miner metrics
endpoints.alerts: GET /v1/alerts — Query active and historical alerts
endpoints.control: POST /v1/control — Send control commands to devices

faq.q1: How do I get API access?
faq.a1: Request platform access and select API access in your application. Approved developers receive API keys and sandbox credentials.
faq.a2: Standard tier allows 1,000 requests per minute. Enterprise tiers with higher limits are available for large-scale deployments.

hero.title: Platform Login
hero.subtitle: Sign in to access your EnergieMIND dashboard and infrastructure monitoring tools.

login.notice: Platform login is currently available for authorized users only. Request access to join the EnergieMIND platform.

faq.q1: How do I get login credentials?
faq.a1: Submit a platform access request. Once approved, you will receive login credentials via secure email.
faq.a2: Yes. TOTP-based two-factor authentication is required for all platform accounts.

hero.title: Request Platform Access
hero.subtitle: Apply for access to the EnergieMIND energy intelligence platform, dashboard, and API tools.

form.message: Tell us about your infrastructure and requirements
form.privacy: By submitting, you agree to our data processing practices. Your information is handled securely by TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems.

faq.a1: Access requests are typically reviewed within 3–5 business days. You will receive an email with next steps upon approval.
faq.q2: What is included with platform access?
faq.a2: Approved users receive dashboard access, monitoring tools, and optional API credentials based on their use case.

footer.description: EnergieMIND is the energy intelligence platform for dashboards, miner monitoring, heat recovery, and AI optimization.

organization.name: EnergieMIND by TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems
organization.description: Energy intelligence platform for infrastructure monitoring, miner fleet management, and AI-driven optimization.

website.description: Technology platform and dashboard for energy operations, miner monitoring, heat recovery metrics, and AI optimization.
